x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CSDM alignment ensures the CMDB uses the ServiceNow Common Service Data Model, which Now Assist is designed to reason over. Business Apps, Service Offerings, and Technical Services are key AI reference entities.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate Business Application (cmdb_ci_business_app) and Service Offering (service_offering) CI classes following the CSDM framework. Target: 10+ Business Applications, 5+ Service Offerings. CSDM alignment ensures the CMDB uses the data model Now Assist is designed to reason over.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_b2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c23
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[CSDM alignment ensures the CMDB uses the ServiceNow Common Service Data Model, which Now Assist is designed to reason over. Business Apps, Service Offerings, and Technical Services are key AI reference entities.]]></ai_justification><check_name>CSDM Alignment</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaBizApps = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci_business_app');
    gaBizApps.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaBizApps.query();
    var bizApps = gaBizApps.next() ? parseInt(gaBizApps.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaOfferings = new GlideAggregate('service_offering');
    gaOfferings.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaOfferings.query();
    var offerings = gaOfferings.next() ? parseInt(gaOfferings.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = 'Business Apps: ' + bizApps + ' | Service Offerings: ' + offerings;

    if (bizApps >= 10 && offerings >= 5) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: bizApps + ' Business Applications and ' + offerings + ' Service Offerings defined. CSDM alignment ensures Now Assist is reasoning over the correct data model for AI service impact analysis.' };
    } else if (bizApps >= 3 || offerings >= 1) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Partial CSDM alignment (' + bizApps + ' Business Apps, ' + offerings + ' Service Offerings). Targets: 10+ Business Apps, 5+ Service Offerings. Incomplete CSDM limits Now Assist service-level AI analysis.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No CSDM alignment (' + bizApps + ' Business Apps, ' + offerings + ' Service Offerings). Now Assist is designed to reason over the CSDM data model — without it, service-level AI analysis is not possible.' };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CMDB</module><number>CHK0000387</number><order>150</order><remediation_guidance>Populate Business Application (cmdb_ci_business_app) and Service Offering (service_offering) CI classes following the CSDM framework. Target: 10+ Business Applications, 5+ Service Offerings. CSDM alignment ensures the CMDB uses the data model Now Assist is designed to reason over.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>b2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c23</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CSDM Alignment</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_b2f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c23</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
